mapper.select: SELECT twoweektestno, memberno, score, result, rdate FROM twoweek_test WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY rdate DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE twoweek_test SET score = #{score}, result = #{result}, rdate = SYSDATE WHERE twoweektestno = #{twoweektestno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM twoweek_test WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY rdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
